content.en:
Ye Tian listened with pricked up ears, waiting for Ouyang Jiu'er to tell him about the secrets of Black Wind Mountain.

I saw Ouyang Jiu'er and said: "Brother Ye, what ordinary people know is that there are ten kings and many heavenly kings in Black Wind Mountain, but few people know the strength of the ten kings, although you know the strength of the ten kings, but the ten kings are not the ultimate combat power of the Black Wind Mountain, and you don't even know the true face of the ten kings!"

"Really?"

Ye Tian frowned.

It is said that when the Ten Kings set out, they were all wearing masks, but when they were inside the Black Wind Mountain, the Ten Kings saw people with their true faces, why did Ouyang Jiu'er say that he didn't know the true faces of the Ten Kings?

Ouyang Jiu'er continued: "You may have seen the Ten Kings, I don't know very well, but the Ten Kings you have seen are just what the Ten Kings want you to see. The real Ten Kings, no one knows their identities. In fact, the Ten Kings are just a title, such as the Wind King, but in fact there is more than one Wind King!"

"What, there is more than one Wind King?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This is amazing news!

"That's right!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "You can treat the Wind King as a position, just like a general, and there is only one general? Naturally not! In fact, the Black Wind Mountain has existed for a long time, and the Wind King has been in existence for generations, but the alternation of the Wind King will not notify you generals and peak masters. Moreover, the Ten Kings have a special secret technique, which can change the aura, unless it is the Invincible Dao Ancestor of the Nine Heavens, he can't see through the Origin Aura of the Ten Kings at all. And I once saw a king of the Black Wind Mountain fall somewhere in a forbidden place, but not long after, that king reappeared. Later, after my investigation, the Ten Kings were just a title, as long as they reached the strength of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, and the old king retreated into the background, the new king could replace the old king and become one of the ten kings! In fact, no one knew how many Supreme True Ancestors there were in the Black Wind Mountain. "

Ye Tian was shocked, if that was the case, he underestimated the strength of Black Wind Mountain too much.

The people of Black Wind Mountain thought that four of the ten kings had fallen, and only six kings remained.

Now it seems that Black Wind Mountain has indeed fallen four Supreme True Ancestors, but it does not mean that Black Wind Mountain only has six Supreme True Ancestors left.

Ouyang Jiu'er continued: "The real secret of Black Wind Mountain is not this, after all, no matter how many Supreme Dao Ancestors there are, it is nothing to the Invincible True Ancestor. Even in the eyes of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, the Xeon True Ancestor was also an ant. If Black Wind Mountain only has this little secret, then it can't be regarded as a force with a great secret. In fact, the real controller of Black Wind Mountain is not the Ten Kings, the Ten Kings are only the superficial controllers. The true controller of the Black Wind Mountain is the Mountain Lord!"

"Mountain Lord?" Ye Tian was surprised, "Why haven't I heard of this title?"

"Have you seen the Black Wind Mountain Headquarters?" Ouyang Jiu'er said with a roll of his eyes.

"Nope!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

Ouyang Jiu'er continued: "Black Wind Mountain should be the force created by the legendary domain ancestor, but at the beginning of its creation, it was not in the vast sea realm, but in other places in the divine heaven realm, but later moved to the vast sea realm, in the ancient records, the first rulers of the Black Wind Mountain were the three mountain masters, not the ten kings, and the ten kings were only the secondary rulers. But as the years passed, many people don't remember the three mountain masters. The three mountain masters are half-step domain ancestor level powerhouses, but they are much stronger than the ten kings! Now, Black Wind Mountain has also entered the Dao Mountain Realm with the domain boundary fragments, and I am not sure if there is a mountain master in Black Wind Mountain, but Black Wind Mountain must have an invincible Dao Ancestor. "

"If you continue to say this, I suspect that there is a domain ancestor in Black Wind Mountain!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"This possibility is also possible!" Ouyang Jiu'er said with a smile: "If one domain ancestor is hidden, other domain ancestors may not be able to find it, maybe there has always been a domain ancestor in the Black Wind Mountain, and even the vast sea ancestor doesn't know about it! In short, the domain boundary fragment has entered the Dao Mountain realm, which contains many secrets, and even I don't know very well." However, there must be a real big secret behind this matter, and it is very likely that Black Wind Mountain knows a little. If you want to know more secrets, I suggest you slowly climb to a higher position in Blackwind Mountain, and maybe you will know everything!"

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

From Ouyang Jiu'er's words, he knew that the water in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was very deep.

He guessed that Ouyang Jiu'er should know more important secrets, but he didn't tell him.

He didn't ask, he was only a true ancestor now, and knowing too many secrets would not do him any good.

......

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm does not have many dimensions like the universe, it has only one main space, and outside the main space is the space-time turbulence, and there is nothing else.

Usually, everyone shuttles through space, that is, they shuttle through space-time turbulence, but as long as they do not enter the space-time turbulence, under the protection of the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, they are not affected by the space-time turbulence at all.

But if you take the initiative to enter the turbulence of time and space, you will get lost in the turbulence of time and space without a certain strength or even a certain means.

And this day.

Ouyang Jiu'er took Ye Tian into the turbulence of time and space!

"Jiu'er, are you sure that the palace of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is in the turbulence of time and space?" Ye Tian asked, he was afraid that Ouyang Jiu'er would not be very reliable, causing the two of them to fall into the turbulence of time and space, so he didn't know how long it would take to come out.

"Of course it's sure!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "When I was in the domain realm, I knew the location of that palace, and one of my treasures was collected by the Heavenly Emperor Palace, so I could roughly determine the location of the palace! They should have a big plan, so the strength of the palace in that place is definitely not high, and there should not be a situation where the invincible True Ancestor will defend it, at most, they will send a few Supreme True Ancestors!"

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The two of them shuttled through the turbulence of time and space, and it didn't take long for them to see an area of shadows.

That shadowed area is a complex of buildings!

"That is one of the palaces of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Guangling Han Palace, which is under the jurisdiction of the Guangling Emperor!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Emperor Guangling is one of the emperors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, his status is very noble, and his strength is also very strong, and he has the strength of an invincible Dao Ancestor.

And such emperors, the Heavenly Emperor Palace has many of them, which shows how powerful the Heavenly Emperor Palace is.

Approaching the Guangling Cold Palace, Ouyang Jiu'er immediately cast the Shadowless Divine Step, took Ye Tian to hide his body together, and observed the situation of the Guangling Cold Palace from a distance.

Ye Tian directly used the copying talent to envelop the Guangling Cold Palace in the distance, probed the talents of the true ancestors one by one, and then judged the strength according to their breath.

"Jiu'er, I've found out! There are about 3,000 people stationed in this Guangling Cold Palace, all of them are True Ancestors, of which there are about nine Supreme True Ancestors, about a hundred top True Ancestors, and the others are all elite True Ancestors!"

Ye Tian said.

"Awesome!Brother Ye, what kind of probing method are you, I can't even sense it?" Ouyang Jiu'er was surprised.

"It's just a little secret art!"

Ye Tian said with a smile, but never revealed the specific situation.

Just kidding, copying talent is his biggest hole card, even his wife doesn't know, how can he tell Ouyang Jiu'er!

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't dwell on this problem, and was ready to let Ye Tian kill him directly.

In the turbulence of time and space, teleportation is almost impossible.

Therefore, as long as all the true ancestors of the Guangling Cold Palace are killed, the news cannot be leaked, and it will be difficult for the Heavenly Emperor Palace to know that something happened to the Guangling Cold Palace!

Even if the Heavenly Emperor Palace sent someone to patrol and check in the future, at that time, she and Ye Tian would have already left.

"Brother Ye, let's kill it directly, I'll block the void, and you kill people!"

Ouyang Jiu'er assigned the task.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Wow!

The two flew over quickly.

In the blink of an eye, the two came to the front of the Guangling Han Palace.

At this time, the true ancestors stationed in the Guangling Cold Palace also discovered Ye Tian, and they were immediately shocked.

It's a turbulent flow of time and space here, how hidden, and a strange true ancestor has come here, this is a big deal!

"This is the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Guangling Han Palace, you are not allowed to approach here!"

The Jade Qi True Ancestor of the Guangling Cold Palace, who was guarding here, said coldly.

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly rewarded the other party with a ten thousand true spears!

Rumble!!!

The space-time turbulence exploded, and the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear directly penetrated the large array of the Guangling Cold Palace, stabbing at the body of the Jade Qi True Ancestor.

Poof!

The Jade Qi True Ancestor was pierced by a blow, and his body exploded, and although he quickly recovered his body, his injuries were extremely serious.

At this moment, the three thousand True Ancestors of the Guangling Cold Palace dispatched and killed Ye Tian one after another.
